sellers_note: Discover the exceptional 2023 Dodge Durango GT Premium 4x4, a commanding presence on any road. This stunning SUV boasts a striking Red exterior, complemented by premium features that elevate your driving experience. - 4X4 - APPLE CARPLAY /ANDROID AUTO - BLUETOOTH - CRUISE CONTROL - HEATED SEATS - HEATED STEERING WHEEL - LEATHER - MOONROOF - NAVIGATION - Power windows/Power Door Locks - THIRD ROW SEATING - BACK UP CAMERA - KEYLESS ENTRY - PREMIUM ALLOY WHEELS - REMOTE STARTER - CARFAX 1 OWNER - Super Low Miles! Equipped with a powerful 3.6L V6 24V VVT engine and an 8-Speed Automatic transmission, this Durango GT Premium delivers exceptional performance and efficiency, with an impressive 18 city/25 highway MPG. The advanced all-wheel-drive system ensures confident handling in any driving condition. The premium interior of this Durango is designed for your ultimate comfort and convenience. Luxurious leather-trimmed seats, heated front and second-row seats, and a heated steering wheel provide a truly indulgent driving experience. The 10.1 Uconnect 5 touchscreen display with built-in navigation, Apple CarPlay, and Android Auto keeps you connected and in control. Safety and technology are also top priorities, with features like Full Speed Forward Collision Warning Plus, Adaptive Cruise Control, and a 4G LTE Wi-Fi hotspot. The Blacktop Package adds a bold, sporty flair with gloss black exterior accents and 20-inch black wheels. Don't miss the opportunity to experience the exceptional 2023 Dodge Durango GT Premium 4x4. Schedule a test drive today and discover the perfect blend of power, luxury, and advanced technology. View the REAL window sticker — click ‘See Vehicle on Dealership Website’ below
